name: Sitka Gold Corp.
description: Sitka Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on maximizing shareholder value through the discovery and development of economic mineral deposits. The company's primary focus is on its flagship RC Gold Project in the Yukon Territory, where it has identified a significant intrusion-related gold system. Sitka Gold also maintains a diverse portfolio of assets, including the Alpha Gold Project in Nevada's Carlin Trend and the Burro Creek Gold-Silver Project in Arizona. By leveraging a management team with a proven track record of discovery, Sitka Gold aims to advance its high-potential projects toward development.
